description: Represents a Kubernetes workload group selector used to identify and group workloads in Kubernetes clusters.

kubernetesNamespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace where the deployment, statefulset or job is located.
kubernetesNamespace.title: kubernetesNamespace

name.description: The name of the Kubernetes deployment, statefulset or job to select.
name.title: name

type.description: The type of Kubernetes workload group to select.
type.title: type

title: KubernetesWorkloadGroupSelector
